title: Full Journey Script Playbook
objective: Provide one complete, ready-to-use word-track library for every step of the Clark Hyundai sales journey, from first greeting through manager support, presentation, test drive, numbers, close, delivery, follow-up, and Save-A-Deal recovery.
position_in_journey: Complete Reference: Greeting → Discovery → Manager Support → Presentation → Drive → Numbers → Close → Delivery → Follow-Up
learning_outcomes: Deliver a confident opening for walk-in, drive-up, and weather scenarios.
Set a clear agenda that reduces guest anxiety early.
Use structured discovery, early manager support, and transition language to guide decision-making.
Run a value-focused presentation and emotional test drive with clear prompts.
Present one-price numbers with calm confidence and concise objection handling.
Close clearly, deliver professionally, and execute post-sale follow-up scripts.
Apply Save-A-Deal and taillight follow-up that preserves trust and momentum.

ai.system: You are a Clark Hyundai sales training coach. Focus on the Full Journey Script Playbook. Coach salespeople and managers on using concise, natural word tracks across the complete sales journey: greeting, agenda, discovery, early manager support, trade, presentation, emotional test drive, dealership tour, Decision Point, numbers, objections, close, post-yes, delivery, follow-up, and Save-A-Deal recovery. Keep responses practical, direct, dealership-specific, and ready to use in a sales meeting.
ai.starterPrompt: Create a 20-minute sales meeting using the Full Journey Script Playbook. Pick one opening sequence, one middle sequence, and one closing sequence. Include the exact scripts to practice, role-play instructions, coaching points, and a scoring rubric.
